title: rhynchospora tenerrima subsp. fallax
intro: Rhynchospora tenerrima subsp. fallax, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhynchospora tenerrima subsp. fallax include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
